title: Teriyaki Lamb Koftas
description: A Japanese-inspired dish featuring lamb koftas served with a sweet teriyaki sauce. This recipe is perfect for a quick and flavorful dinner.

ingredients.name: ground lamb
ingredients.notes: Make sure to handle and store lamb safely

ingredients.name: sesame oil
ingredients.notes: Add a nutty flavor to the sauce

instructions: 2. In a large bowl, combine ground lamb, croatian paprika, salt, and black pepper. Mix well with your hands until just combined.
3. Use your hands to shape the lamb mixture into small koftas.
4. Grill the koftas for 4-5 minutes per side, or until they are cooked to your desired level of doneness.
5. While the koftas are cooking, prepare the teriyaki sauce by whisking together soy sauce, brown sugar, rice vinegar, and sesame oil in a small bowl.
6. Once the koftas are cooked, brush them with the teriyaki sauce and let them cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
7. Serve the koftas hot with additional teriyaki sauce on the side. Garnish with chopped green onions.
